name: kizano-story-packager
description: Packages and compiles the server and web versions for deployment.

scripts.build: (cd server && npm run build) && (cd web && npm run build)
scripts.dist: (cd server && npm run dist) && (cd web && npm run dist)
scripts.test: (cd server && npm run test) && (cd web && npm run test)

author: Markizano Draconus <markizano@markizano.net>
